savings.title: Savings
savings.inputs.title: Savings parameters
savings.inputs.cbrTooltip: Russian Central Bank key rate. Changes at CBR meetings (at most every 6 weeks). Check cbr.ru.
savings.inputs.includeYield: Include expected yield in end-of-horizon balance
savings.layer.A.name: Layer A · Operational
savings.layer.B.name: Layer B · Planned
savings.layer.C.name: Layer C · Reserve
savings.layerCard.noCandidates: No instrument classes match this regime
savings.layerCard.noIncomeHint: No income — layer has zero allocation or horizon is too short
savings.taxBanner: Tax-free interest threshold on deposits: ≈ {amount} ₽/year. Above it — 13% personal income tax.
savings.asvWarning: Exceeds the 1.4M ₽ AGV (deposit insurance) limit per bank. Consider splitting.
savings.disclaimer: Informational overview of instrument classes, not individual investment advice. Verify specific banks, issuers, and terms yourself.
savings.emptyState: Enter free cash above — layers are split automatically and matching instrument classes appear here.
savings.riskBadge.methodology: Risk classification: CONS — capital-protected instruments (deposit insurance, inflation indexation, floaters); STD — minor principal or liquidity volatility; HIGH — notable drawdown, credit or FX exposure.
savings.print.title: Savings allocation
savings.classes.savings_account.name: Savings account with daily interest
savings.classes.savings_account.taxNote: Interest may be taxed above the threshold.
savings.classes.savings_account.riskNote: Bank can change the rate any time. AGV limit 1.4M ₽.
savings.classes.term_deposit.name: Term deposit (3/6/12 mo)
savings.classes.term_deposit.taxNote: 13% personal income tax above the threshold.
savings.classes.term_deposit.riskNote: Early withdrawal wipes out interest. AGV limit 1.4M ₽.
savings.classes.mm_fund.name: Money-market fund (RUB)
savings.classes.mm_fund.riskNote: Low risk but not a deposit: no AGV insurance, yield not guaranteed.
savings.classes.ofz_pd.name: OFZ-PD (fixed-coupon gov bond)
savings.classes.ofz_pd.riskNote: Price falls when rates rise — selling before maturity may lock in a loss.
savings.classes.ofz_pk.name: OFZ-PK (RUONIA-linked floater)
savings.classes.ofz_pk.riskNote: Coupon tracks RUONIA, price steadier than PD, yield is variable.
savings.classes.ofz_in.name: OFZ-IN (inflation-linked)
savings.classes.ofz_in.riskNote: Inflation protection; nominal yield modest when inflation is low.
savings.classes.corp_bond.name: First-tier corporate bonds (RUB)
savings.classes.corp_bond.riskNote: Issuer credit risk, lower liquidity than OFZ.
savings.classes.replacement_bond.name: Replacement bond (USD-settled)
savings.classes.replacement_bond.taxNote: USD coupon taxed at 13% at CBR exchange rate.
savings.classes.replacement_bond.riskNot: Currency risk, settlement in RUB at CBR rate. Limited liquidity.
savings.classes.cny_bond.name: CNY-denominated bonds
savings.classes.cny_bond.taxNote: Coupon and FX revaluation in CNY taxed at 13%.
savings.classes.gold.name: Gold (exchange-traded / OMS / Seligdar gold bonds)
savings.classes.gold.taxNote: OMS: tax on sale. Exchange gold and gold bonds: tax on gains, 3-yr long-hold relief.
savings.classes.gold.riskNote: Price swings sharply; defensive, not income-producing.
savings.classes.savings_account.edu.what: Bank account that pays interest on the balance. Money is available any day; the rate may be changed by the bank.
savings.classes.savings_account.edu.howT: Opened at a bank branch or via the bank's mobile app. Often linked to a debit card.
savings.classes.savings_account.edu.yiel: Rate ≈ CBR key rate − 1…3 pp. The bank may change it unilaterally. Interest accrues monthly.
savings.classes.savings_account.edu.tax: Russian bank interest is taxed at 13% PIT above the annual exempt threshold (CBR × ₽1M/year).
savings.classes.savings_account.edu.when: For the 0–30 day cash cushion. Up to ₽1.4M per bank is covered by deposit insurance (АСВ).
savings.classes.term_deposit.edu.whatItI: Fixed-rate bank deposit for 3, 6, or 12 months. Early withdrawal forfeits the accrued interest.
savings.classes.term_deposit.edu.howToBu: Opened at a bank branch or via the bank's mobile app. A term must be selected.
savings.classes.term_deposit.edu.yieldBe: Rate ≈ CBR key rate − 0.5…+1.5 pp. Locked in for the full term of the deposit.
savings.classes.term_deposit.edu.tax: 13% PIT on interest above the annual exempt threshold (CBR × ₽1M/year).
savings.classes.term_deposit.edu.whenToP: For money you are certain you will not need before the term ends. АСВ deposit insurance covers up to ₽1.4M per bank.
savings.classes.mm_fund.edu.whatItIs: Exchange-traded fund holding short-dated government bonds and repo trades. Functionally similar to a savings account but without АСВ coverage.
savings.classes.mm_fund.edu.howToBuy: On the Moscow Exchange through a broker. Tickers such as LQDT, AKMM, SBMM. One unit ≈ ₽1.
savings.classes.mm_fund.edu.yieldBehavio: Yield ≈ CBR key rate − 0.5…1 pp. Accrual is daily; sellable on any trading day.
savings.classes.mm_fund.edu.tax: 13% PIT on gains at sale. A Type-B IIS account exempts gains from tax.
savings.classes.mm_fund.edu.whenToPick: When you already have a brokerage account and prefer not to split cash across banks for АСВ coverage.
savings.classes.ofz_pd.edu.whatItIs: OFZ federal bond with a fixed coupon. Russian government debt in rubles.
savings.classes.ofz_pd.edu.howToBuy: On the Moscow Exchange through a broker. Face value ₽1,000. Coupon paid semi-annually.
savings.classes.ofz_pd.edu.yieldBehavior: Yield to maturity ≈ CBR key rate − 1…+0.5 pp. Price falls when rates rise — selling before maturity may book a loss.
savings.classes.ofz_pd.edu.tax: Coupon is taxed at 13% PIT. A Type-A IIS account gives a 13% deduction on contributions; a Type-B IIS account exempts gains from tax.
savings.classes.ofz_pd.edu.whenToPick: When you expect the CBR key rate to fall and are willing to hold to maturity.
savings.classes.ofz_pk.edu.whatItIs: OFZ federal bond with a floating coupon tied to the RUONIA rate.
savings.classes.ofz_pk.edu.howToBuy: On the Moscow Exchange through a broker. Face value ₽1,000.
savings.classes.ofz_pk.edu.yieldBehavior: Coupon resets every 3–6 months against average RUONIA. Price moves less than fixed-coupon OFZ-PD.
savings.classes.ofz_pk.edu.tax: Coupon is taxed at 13% PIT. A Type-B IIS account exempts gains from tax.
savings.classes.ofz_pk.edu.whenToPick: When the CBR key rate may rise or its path is unclear. Low sensitivity to rate moves.
savings.classes.ofz_in.edu.whatItIs: OFZ federal bond with inflation protection. Face value is indexed to CPI.
savings.classes.ofz_in.edu.howToBuy: On the Moscow Exchange through a broker. 52000-series tickers.
savings.classes.ofz_in.edu.yieldBehavior: 2.5% coupon on the indexed face value plus CPI indexation. Real yield ≈ 2.5% + inflation.
savings.classes.ofz_in.edu.tax: Coupon is taxed at 13% PIT. The face-value indexation paid at maturity is also taxed.
savings.classes.ofz_in.edu.whenToPick: To protect long-duration money from inflation. Horizon of 1+ year.
savings.classes.corp_bond.edu.whatItIs: Bond issued by a top-tier Russian company (Sberbank, Rosneft, Russian Railways, etc.).
savings.classes.corp_bond.edu.howToBuy: On the Moscow Exchange through a broker. Face value typically ₽1,000.
savings.classes.corp_bond.edu.yieldBehav: Yield ≈ CBR key rate + 0.5…2 pp (credit risk premium). Price reacts both to rates and to issuer-specific news.
savings.classes.corp_bond.edu.tax: Coupon is taxed at 13% PIT. A Type-B IIS account exempts gains from tax.
savings.classes.corp_bond.edu.whenToPick: When you are willing to take credit risk for extra yield. Diversify across issuers.
savings.classes.replacement_bond.edu.wha: Replacement bond — issued in rubles but indexed to the US dollar. Coupon and principal are denominated in USD; payments are in rubles at the CBR rate.
savings.classes.replacement_bond.edu.how: On the Moscow Exchange through a broker. No FX account required.
savings.classes.replacement_bond.edu.yie: Yield ≈ 6…9% in dollars. Ruble return = dollar yield + ruble depreciation.
savings.classes.replacement_bond.edu.tax: 13% PIT on the coupon and on FX gains at sale or maturity.
savings.classes.replacement_bond.edu.whe: To hedge ruble depreciation on a 1+ year horizon. Acceptance of sanctions and settlement risk.
savings.classes.cny_bond.edu.whatItIs: Bond denominated in Chinese yuan. Coupon and principal in CNY, settled through a Russian broker.
savings.classes.cny_bond.edu.howToBuy: On the Moscow Exchange through a broker that supports the CNY section.
savings.classes.cny_bond.edu.yieldBehavi: Yield ≈ 5…8% in yuan. Ruble return = yuan yield + CNY/RUB movement.
savings.classes.cny_bond.edu.tax: 13% PIT on the coupon and on FX gains at sale or maturity.
savings.classes.cny_bond.edu.whenToPick: Currency diversification without dollar exposure. Acceptance of a thin secondary market.
savings.classes.gold.edu.whatItIs: Exchange-traded gold or gold-linked bonds (OMS unallocated metal accounts, futures, Seligdar gold replacement bonds). Principal tracks the LBMA gold price.
savings.classes.gold.edu.howToBuy: On the Moscow Exchange through a broker, or at a bank via an unallocated metal account (OMS).
savings.classes.gold.edu.yieldBehavior: Return = change in the ruble gold price. Can be as much as +20% or −15% in a year. Pays no coupon.
savings.classes.gold.edu.tax: 13% PIT on gains at sale. A Type-B IIS account exempts gains for exchange-traded forms.
savings.classes.gold.edu.whenToPick: Protection against systemic shocks. No more than 5–10% of the portfolio. Acceptance of large drawdowns.
savings.instrument.name: Name
savings.picker.hint: Tap a template to learn more
savings.picker.title: Add instrument
savings.status.earlyWithdraw: Term ends {date} — early withdrawal at voyage forfeits interest
savings.status.maturedAt: Matured before today — update Assets to reflect payout
savings.templates.corp_bond.details: Bonds issued by Russian corporations. Higher yield than OFZ, with credit risk. Treated as simple-interest paying at maturity.
savings.templates.corp_bond.name: Corporate bond
savings.templates.custom.details: A blank instrument where you specify rate, term, and compounding manually. Use this when your bank's offer doesn't fit any template.
savings.templates.custom.name: Custom
savings.templates.mm_fund.details: A mutual fund of short-term money-market instruments. Daily compounding, no fixed term, slightly higher than a savings account.
savings.templates.mm_fund.name: Money-market fund
savings.templates.ofz_pd.details: Russian federal bonds with a fixed coupon. Treated here as a simple-interest instrument paying at maturity. Buy on MOEX.
savings.templates.ofz_pd.name: OFZ-PD
savings.templates.ofz_pk.details: Russian federal bonds with a floating coupon tied to RUONIA. Treated here as a fixed-rate approximation at the rate you enter.
savings.templates.ofz_pk.name: OFZ-PK
savings.templates.savings_account.detail: An on-demand bank account that pays daily interest. Open-ended — no maturity. Lowest rate of the deposit family but maximum flexibility.
savings.templates.savings_account.name: Savings account
savings.templates.term_deposit.details: A bank deposit locked for a fixed period. Interest compounds monthly. Higher rate than a savings account, but early withdrawal forfeits all interest in Russia.
savings.templates.term_deposit.name: Term deposit
savings.zeroState.body: Park money in deposits or bonds to grow it before the voyage. Each instrument's amount is separate from your Assets wallet — enter what's committed here, not what's in your account.
